commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Cyrene, not in Egypt, where he had no power, but near the river Cyrus, (Calmet) in higher Media. (Josephus)
Hebrew, "and took it and carried the inhabitants captives to Kir "(Haydock) whence the Syrians had come originally, Amos ix. 7. Arbaces, who had dismembered Media from the Assyrians empire, was now dead, and the king of Nineve had retaken several cities, occupying Rages, (Tobias i. 16.) before Dejoces mounted the throne, and extended the empire of the Medes. (Usher)
The people of Sepharvaim lived also on the borders of Media, chap. xviii. 11.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
